3.Add tomato and spices, cook to a base. 
4.Add spinach puree and simmer. 
5.Stir in cream and serve hot.
Ingredients: Spinach, onion, tomato, garlic, ginger, cream, oil, spices, salt

Description: Rich and creamy chicken curry with mild spices, smooth and indulgent.
Recipe_steps:
1.Heat butter/oil, sauté onion and ginger-garlic. 
2.Add chicken and cook until browned. 
3.Add tomato and spices, cook to a base. 
4.Add cream and mix gently. 
5.Simmer until cooked and serve hot.
Ingredients: Chicken, cream, onion, tomato, ginger-garlic paste, butter/oil, spices, salt

3.Add spices and mix well. 
4.Pour coconut milk and simmer gently. 
5.Cook until chicken is tender and serve hot.

Recipe_steps:

2.Heat oil, sauté onion, garlic, and ginger. 
3.Add tomato and cook to a base. 
4.Add chicken and ground paste, mix well. 
5.Cook until chicken is tender and serve hot.
Ingredients: Chicken, onion, tomato, garlic, ginger, dried red chili, coconut, spices, oil, salt, coriander

Recipe_steps:

2.Add chopped onion, tomato, and chili. 
3.Add chutneys and chaat masala. 
4.Mix gently to coat evenly. 
5.Garnish with coriander and serve immediately.

2.Place on a plate and add yogurt. 
3.Drizzle green and tamarind chutney. 
4.Add onion, chaat masala, and sev. 
5.Garnish with coriander and serve immediately.
Ingredients: Idli, oil, yogurt, green chutney, tamarind chutney, onion, chaat masala, sev, coriander

Description: Spiced dry lentil dish with bold flavors, simple, protein-rich, and flavorful.
Recipe_steps:

2.Heat oil, sauté cumin, onion, garlic, and ginger. 
3.Add tomato and spices, cook to a dry masala. 
4.Add cooked dal and mix well. 
5.Cook until dry and serve hot.
Ingredients: Chana dal, onion, tomato, garlic, ginger, cumin, turmeric, chili powder, oil, salt, coriander

Description: Rich Mughlai-style lentil curry with aromatic spices and creamy texture.
Recipe_steps:
1.Cook dal until soft. 
2.Heat ghee, sauté whole spices, onion, garlic, and ginger. 
3.Add yogurt/cream and spices, cook well. 
4.Add cooked dal and simmer. 
5.Garnish with coriander and serve hot.
Ingredients: Mixed dal, onion, garlic, ginger, yogurt/cream, whole spices, ghee, chili powder, salt, coriander

Recipe_steps:

2.Deep fry koftas until golden. 
3.Prepare gravy with onion, tomato, and spices. 
4.Add cream and cashew paste, simmer.

Ingredients: Paneer, potato, bread crumbs, onion, tomato, cream, cashew paste, spices, oil, salt

Description: Crunchy snack with papri, yogurt, chutneys, and spices, tangy and flavorful.
Recipe_steps:
1.Arrange papri on a plate. 
2.Add potato and chickpeas. 
3.Top with yogurt and chutneys. 
4.Sprinkle chaat masala and sev. 
5.Garnish with coriander and serve immediately.
Ingredients: Papri, yogurt, boiled potato, chickpeas, tamarind chutney, green chutney, chaat masala, sev, coriander

Description: Spiced yogurt-marinated chicken cooked quickly in microwave, smoky and flavorful.
Recipe_steps:
1.Marinate chicken with yogurt, spices, and lemon juice. 
2.Let it rest for at least 30 mins. 
3.Place in microwave-safe dish and brush with oil. 
4.Microwave until chicken is cooked through. 
5.Rest briefly and serve hot.
Ingredients: Chicken, yogurt, ginger-garlic paste, lemon juice, tandoori masala, chili powder, oil, salt

Description: Quick sautéed eggplant with spices, soft, flavorful, and lightly crispy.

3.Sauté onion and garlic until soft.

Ingredients: Brinjal (eggplant), onion, garlic, mustard seeds, curry leaves, turmeric, chili powder, oil, salt

2.Mix chopped onion with spices and herbs. 
3.Stuff mixture into dough and roll into paratha. 
4.Cook on tawa with oil/ghee until golden. 
5.Serve hot.

5.Serve hot.

Description: Nutritious flatbread made with ragi flour and spiced filling, healthy and filling.

4.Cook on tawa with oil/ghee until golden. 
5.Serve hot.

2.Mash sweet potato and mix with spices. 
3.Stuff into dough and roll into paratha. 
4.Cook on tawa with oil/ghee until crisp. 
5. Serve hot.
Ingredients: Wheat flour, sweet potato, green chili, spices, coriander, oil/ghee, salt

4.Cook on hot tawa or oven until puffed.

Recipe_name: Barfi Recipe | Coconut Burfi Recipe | How to Make Coconut Barfi

2.Divide and roll into small puris.

5.Serve hot.
Ingredients: Wheat flour, boiled potato, spices, green chili, coriander, oil, salt

2.Add hot peas masala over puris.

Recipe_name: Missi Roti Recipe: How to Make Missi Roti | Recipe for Missi Roti

3.Heat tawa and place roti. 
4.Cook with oil/ghee until golden spots appear.

Recipe_name: Homemade Cake Recipe: How to Make Homemade Cake for Christmas | Easy Homemade Cake Recipe

5.Bake at 180°C until done, cool and serve.

4.Pour into serving glasses. 
5.Chill until set and serve.

3.Fold in blueberries gently.
